migrationerror.title: Database Migration Failed!
migrationerror.description: If you are seeing this, something has gone terribly wrong. Report this error below, include a screenshot of the log above.

about.body1: ChatterUI is a free and open-source application developed by Vali-98
about.body2: This app is a passion project I develop in my free time. If you're enjoying the app, consider supporting its development!
about.report: Got an issue? Report it here:
about.logs: Don't forget to add your Logs!

users.hint: Hint: Swipe Left or press <icon/> to open the Users drawer

sampler.title: Samplers

sampler.nosamplers: You probably haven't added an API connection yet

contextlimit.warning: Low Chat Context will forget messages faster

deletekv.title: Delete KV Cache
deletekv.description:
Are you sure you want to delete the KV Cache? This cannot be undone. 

 This will clear up {{size}} of space.

deletemodel.title: Delete Model
deletemodel.description:
Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'?

This cannot be undone!
deletemodel.external: (This will not delete external model files, just this entry)

model.title: Models
model.savekvdesc: Saves the KV cache on generations, allowing you to continue sessions after closing the app. Must use the same model for this to function properly. Saving the KV cache file may be very big and negatively impact battery life!

textformatter.title: Text Formatter
textformatter.description: Automatically formats first message to the style below

hiddentext.title: Hidden Text
hiddentext.description: Hides text that matches regex patterns defined below. (case insensitive)

localtemplate.title: Local Template
localtemplate.label: Use Built-In Local Model Template
localtemplate.description: When in Local Mode, ChatterUI automatically uses the instruct template provided by the loaded model. Disable this if you want messages to be formatted using Instruct instead. System Prompt however is always used.

filteredtext.label: Send Filtered Text
filteredtext.description: Sends the filtered text for inference

formatting.title: Formatting
formatting.regenerateDefaultsDescription: Are you sure you want to regenerate default Instructs?
formatting.deleteConfigDescription: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'?

regenerateDefaults.title: Regenerate Default Instructs
regenerateDefaults.description: Are you sure you want to regenerate default Instructs?

deleteConfig.title: Delete Config
deleteConfig.description: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'?

chat.title: Chat
chat.useFirstMessageDescription: Add an initial message when creating a new chat.
chat.loadChatOnStartupDescription: Automatically reopen the last chat when the app launches.
chat.autoLoadUserDescription: Automatically load the current user profile into new chats.
chat.autoGenerateTitlesDescription: Create titles for new chats automatically.
chat.askInChatterUIDescription: Use ChatterUI prompts for text intent instead of the default keyboard behavior.

chatwindow.title: Chat Window
chatwindow.autoScrollDescription: Scroll to the latest message automatically.
chatwindow.sendOnEnterDescription: Send your message when pressing Enter.
chatwindow.quickDeleteDescription: Allow deleting text with a quick swipe gesture.
chatwindow.saveScrollPositionDescription: Restore the last chat position when reopening the conversation.
chatwindow.wideChatDescription: Use a wider layout for the chat window.
chatwindow.alternatePositionsDescription: Alternate incoming and outgoing message alignment.

deleteBackground.title: Delete Background
deleteBackground.description: Are you sure you want to delete this background? This cannot be undone!

deleteTheme.title: Delete Theme
deleteTheme.description: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'? This cannot be undone!

generating.title: Generation
generating.printContextDescription: Prints the generation context to logs for debugging
generating.bypassContextLengthDescription: Ignores context length limits when building prompts

notification.title: Notifications
notification.enableNotificationsDescription: Sends notifications when the app is in the background

database.title: Database Management
database.warningText: WARNING: ensure imported database is from the same app version!

export.title: Export Database
export.description:
Are you sure you want to export the database file?

It will automatically be downloaded to Downloads

import.title: Import Database
import.description:
Are you sure you want to import this database? This may destroy the current database!

A backup will automatically be downloaded.

App will restart automatically

versionMismatch.title: Different Version
versionMismatch.description: The imported database file has a different app version ({{importedVersion}}) than the installed version ({{currentVersion}}). Importing this database may break or corrupt the database. It is recommended to use the same app version.

rerunMigrations.title: Rerun Migrations
rerunMigrations.description: Rerunning migrations may destroy your database. Be sure to export a backup.

screen.title: Screen
screen.unlockOrientationDescription: Allows landscape on phones (App restart required)

security.title: Security
security.lockAppDescription: Requires user authentication to open the app. This will not work if you have no device locks enabled.

regenerateDefaultCard.title: Regenerate Default Card
regenerateDefaultCard.description: This will add the default AI Bot card to your character list.

tagHider.label: Hidden Tags
tagHider.description: Hide characters with the following tags from the character list.

horizontalSelector.label: Selector Label
horizontalSelector.description: Optional helpful description for the selector.

delete.title: Delete Logs
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete all logs? This cannot be undone.
